title: Spies inducted as Rotary Club president
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Last weekend, Murro-Wayne Spies was officially inducted as the new president of the Rotary Club of Knysna.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Last weekend, Murro-Wayne Spies was officially inducted as the new president of the Rotary Club of Knysna."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Rotary year begins on 1 July and runs through to 30 June.","html":"The Rotary year begins on 1 July and runs through to 30 June."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Spies is a member of Knysna’s fire department and has been a committed Rotarian for several years."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The club’s management extended their best wishes to Spies for a successful year ahead and expressed their enthusiasm for the exciting plans he will bring to the club in the coming months.","html":"The club’s management extended their best wishes to Spies for a successful year ahead and expressed their enthusiasm for the exciting plans he will bring to the club in the coming months."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Spies inducted as Rotary Club president
